from source import wrap

def test_wrap_appends_trailing_text():
    text = 'aaa bbb ccc'
    cols = 4
    expected_output = ['aaa', 'bbb', 'ccc']
    assert wrap(text, cols) == expected_output, f"Expected wrap('{text}', {cols}) to return {expected_output}, but got {wrap(text, cols)}"
